message:
Running command: echo "$(date)"
# Check drain process
ps aux | grep "cat /proc/214817/fd/11" | grep -v grep | head -3
echo ""
# Check if drain is still reading (file size growing?)
ls -lh /tmp/yosys_drain.log
echo ""
# Check Yosys state again
ps -p 216314 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Check LibreLane state
ps -p 214817 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan 2>/dev/null

function.arguments:
{"command": "echo "$(date)"
# Check drain process
ps aux | grep "cat /proc/214817/fd/11" | grep -v grep | head -3
echo ""
# Check if drain is still reading (file size growing?)
ls -lh /tmp/yosys_drain.log
echo ""
# Check Yosys state again
ps -p 216314 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Check LibreLane state
ps -p 214817 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan 2>/dev/null", "timeout": 15}
function.name: execute_bash
